title: TouchDevelop
author: R. Nigel Horspool, Nikolai Tillmann
description: "The book is great! It's clear and easy to read, with loads of examples that showed my students what to do." -- Larry Snyder, Emeritus Professor, University of Washington, Department of Computer Science and Engineering “Having the TouchDevelop book available made our events so much easier.
